As an AI language model, I do not have personal opinions or preferences. However, here is a list of some of the top government MBBS medical colleges in India:

1. All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi
2. Maulana Azad Medical College, New Delhi
3. Armed Forces Medical College, Pune
4. Christian Medical College, Vellore
5. Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research, Puducherry
6. Lady Hardinge Medical College, New Delhi
7. Grant Medical College, Mumbai
8. King George's Medical University, Lucknow
9. Institute of Medical Sciences, Banaras Hindu University, Varanasi
10. Madras Medical College, Chennai

Note: This list is not exhaustive and there may be other top government medical colleges in India as well.
